content: A 2025 configurable ICM curiosity mechanism for swarm UAVs can be redesigned to encode Leonard Shelby-style anterograde amnesia from *Memento*, where the ICM only retains learned feature embeddings of newly discovered unexplored environments and forgets embeddings of already mapped zones to amplify intrinsic reward for open-ended swarm exploration. This amnesic ICM design mimics Shelby’s reliance on marking novel, unprocessed information to drive his forward behavior, turning a narrative plot device into a functional exploration optimization.
